h2: In 1975, brothers Ron and Dan Shimek started tinkering in a modest garage with the simple idea that fireplaces could be better - warmer, safer and more beautiful. That spark grew into Heat & Glo, a brand built on turning innovation into comfort and design that’s enjoyable for everyday life

paragraphs: In 1975, brothers Ron and Dan Shimek started tinkering in a modest garage with the simple idea that fireplaces could be better - warmer, safer and more beautiful. That spark grew into Heat & Glo, a brand built on turning innovation into comfort and design that’s enjoyable for everyday life
We introduced a fresh perspective. See-through glass fireplaces opened new possibilities in design and connection, launching what would become an award-winning brand.
Recognized as a top 25 breakthrough in residential construction, our invention brought safer, cleaner, more efficient fireplaces to homes everywhere. It’s now an industry standard.
We patented a ceramic firebox that accelerates room warming while reducing energy waste.
We unveiled our first fireplace certified as a furnace (93% efficiency) proving form and function can co-exist.
We made our glass safe to the touch and introduced flexible venting so fireplaces can be installed in more types of spaces.
Awarded at the International Builders’ Show, this honor recognized our dedication to pairing aesthetic beauty with everyday usability.
Smart control for the way you live, by Wi-Fi or the sound of your voice
We celebrate five decades of redefining the fireplace. What started in a garage has become the standard for warmth and innovation across millions of homes.

We make it easy for your home to feel like a retreat. Every one of our fireplaces combines design and technology, blending clean lines, smart controls and efficient heat with the kind of beauty that makes a room feel complete. Comfort isn’t just created, it’s built in.

You have a unique vision, and we help you express it. With more than 1,200 local authorized dealers, we are your experienced advisor and installer. Whatever style you choose, we bring it to life with safety, convenience and captivating presence.
